name: ESOP Disposition Tax Exceptions

eligibility.description: Applies to employers or cooperatives that have acquired securities in a section 1042 sale or 664(g) transfer and need to dispose of them within 3 years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoid the 10% excise tax on early dispositions of ESOP securities by structuring the transfer as a distribution due to death, disability, retirement after age 59.5, or a qualified corporate reorganization.
